name: JellyNotify
description: Personal notification plugin for Jellyfin with Overseerr/Jellyseerr, Sonarr, and Radarr integration.
overview: JellyNotify adds per-user Jellyfin notifications with a bell, unread badge, notification panel, and toast alerts. Requests and download events are mapped to the Jellyfin user who requested the content; unmapped events are skipped for privacy.

versions.changelog:
JellyNotify v0.1.0.3 - config page polish: no more overlaid background, centered header and tabs

Compatible with Jellyfin 10.11.11 (the version this build targets and was verified against), Seerr 3.3.0, Radarr 6.1.1.10360, Sonarr 4.0.17.2952, and Jellyfin Enhanced 11.12.0.0.

- Removed the config page's ambient gradient background entirely - it kept visibly overlaying whatever background Jellyfin's own theme (or a custom theme like ElegantFin) already paints, even after earlier attempts to tone it down.
- General and Diagnostico card titles now share the same display font as the other section titles.
- The tab bar now hugs its own buttons and sits centered, instead of stretching the full width of the page.
- The header title and subtitle are centered, with a notification icon on each side for symmetry.

JellyNotify v0.1.0.2 - fixes the config page background leaking into other plugins

Compatible with Jellyfin 10.11.11 (the version this build targets and was verified against), Seerr 3.3.0, Radarr 6.1.1.10360, Sonarr 4.0.17.2952, and Jellyfin Enhanced 11.12.0.0.

- Fixed the v0.1.0.1 ambient background rule being unscoped, which painted it onto every other plugin's config page (and Jellyfin's own settings pages) instead of just JellyNotify's own.
- Same visual restyle, /status ordering, and notification language truncation as v0.1.0.1 otherwise unchanged.
- If you already had v0.1.0.1 installed, this republish under a new version number is also what makes Jellyfin actually fetch it - reusing the same version string does not trigger a redownload.

JellyNotify v0.1.0.1 - new holographic visual style, smarter /status and notifications

Compatible with Jellyfin 10.11.11 (the version this build targets and was verified against), Seerr 3.3.0, Radarr 6.1.1.10360, Sonarr 4.0.17.2952, and Jellyfin Enhanced 11.12.0.0.

- Full visual restyle of the config page and the bell/panel/toasts: glass cards with a violet-to-cyan gradient border, a self-hosted Orbitron/Exo 2 font pairing, glowing status pills with a live pulse, and an ambient background on the config page.
- /status now lists each category most-recent-first, so a title that just started downloading is never hidden behind older entries.
- Audio and subtitle language lists in Contenido Disponible notifications are now capped at 3 entries, with the rest folded into a trailing count.

JellyNotify v0.1.0.0 - initial release

Compatible with Jellyfin 10.11.11 (the version this build targets and was verified against), Seerr 3.3.0, Radarr 6.1.1.10360, Sonarr 4.0.17.2952, and Jellyfin Enhanced 11.12.0.0.

Per-user Jellyfin notifications with a bell, unread badge, notification panel, and toast alerts. Integrates with Overseerr/Jellyseerr, Sonarr, and Radarr via instant webhooks, with Discord, Telegram, and WhatsApp delivery.
